caption: The video features a man sitting in a radio studio, engaging in what appears to be a podcast or talk show segment titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a black cap with an emblem, a dark t-shirt with text, and headphones around his neck. The man gestures with his right hand while speaking into a microphone, indicating he is actively communicating with either a host or an audience. The background includes a banner with stars and the words "Unique Hustle," along with other promotional elements for the show. The setting suggests a professional yet casual atmosphere typical of a podcast recording environment.
